_comment: Live-captured ChatMessage shape for a vampire roll on a WoD5e v5.x Foundry world. Output of `JSON.stringify({rolls, flags, flavor, type, rollMode}, null, 2)` run on `game.messages.contents.at(-1)`. Use as ground truth for the post-roll message structure.
_observations: rolls[0].formula carries the splat — dv+dg = vampire, dw+dr = werewolf, dh+ds = hunter, dm only = mortal. More reliable than rolls[0].system (which was undefined here).
flags: {} confirms WoD5e does NOT persist roll metadata (criticals, margin, bestial flags) on the message. That data is recomputed render-time from the dice results.
vtmtools mirroring rolls must parse rolls[0].formula + rolls[0]._formula and recompute success/critical/bestial categories from the raw dice results.
12 basic vampire dice, 0 hunger dice (matches Jesper's hunger.value: 0 from the actor sample).
